primaryPhylogenyCitation.title: A redescription of Trachelosaurus fischeri from the Buntsandstein (Middle Triassic) of Bernburg, Germany: the first European Dinocephalosaurus-like marine reptile and its systematic implications for long-necked early archosauromorphs

phylorefs.label: Trachelosauridae
phylorefs.dwc:scientificNameAuthorship: Spiekman, Stephan N. and Ezcurra, Martin D. and Rytel, Adam and Wang, Wei and Mujal, Eudald and Buchwitz, Michael and Schoch, Rainer

obo:IAO_0000119.title: A redescription of Trachelosaurus fischeri from the Buntsandstein (Middle Triassic) of Bernburg, Germany: the first European Dinocephalosaurus-like marine reptile and its systematic implications for long-necked early archosauromorphs

phylorefs.cladeDefinition: The most inclusive clade containing Trachelosaurus fischeri Broili, 1918 and Dinocephalosaurus orientalis Li, 2003 but not Tanystropheus longobardicus (Bassani, 1886), Macrocnemus bassanii Nopcsa, 1931, Protorosaurus speneri von Meyer, 1832, or Prolacerta broomi Parrington, 1935
